email.subject: Roof condition check — 1101 Madison St
email.body:
1101 Madison St is a significant asset, and roof condition directly impacts your maintenance budget and property value. No recent permit activity suggests the roof hasn't been formally assessed in a while. That gap often leads to surprise failures and emergency costs that dwarf planned repairs.

Would a quick walkthrough and photo-documented condition report be worth your time? I can give you a straight read on what you're actually working with.
email.signature_line: 16 years serving commercial properties in Northern and Central New Jersey.
email.sender_title: Commercial Roofing Advisor, Garden State Commercial Roofing
